allow: PowerShell(wsl bash -lc "echo '--- VBoxManage dans WSL ? ---'; command -v VBoxManage || echo 'pas de VBoxManage natif dans WSL'; echo '--- VMs vues depuis WSL ---'; VBoxManage list vms 2>/dev/null || VBoxManage.exe list vms 2>/dev/null || echo 'aucune commande VBoxManage utilisable'")

PowerShell(wsl bash -lc "echo HOME=\\$HOME; echo SHELL=\\$SHELL; getent passwd \\$\(whoami\) | cut -d: -f7; echo '--- vagrant ---'; which vagrant; vagrant --version; echo '--- box ---'; vagrant box list 2>/dev/null | grep alpine317 || echo 'box alpine317 absente dans WSL'; echo '--- zshrc ---'; ls -la \\$HOME/.zshrc 2>/dev/null || echo 'pas de .zshrc'")

PowerShell(wsl bash -lc 'echo HOME=$HOME; echo LOGINSHELL=$\(getent passwd $\(id -un\) | cut -d: -f7\); echo USER=$\(id -un\); echo "--- rc files ---"; ls -la $HOME/.zshrc $HOME/.bashrc $HOME/.zshenv 2>/dev/null; echo "--- end ---"')

PowerShell(wsl bash -lc 'test -f $HOME/.zshrc && echo "zshrc: EXISTE" || echo "zshrc: ABSENT"; echo "--- box list ---"; vagrant box list; echo "--- grep wrapper deja present ? ---"; grep -c "vagrant-dotfiles" $HOME/.zshrc 2>/dev/null || echo 0')
